nasb.text: (But from my youth he grew up with me as with a father, And from infancy I guided her),

esv.text: (for from my youth the fatherless grew up with me as with a father, and from my mother’s womb I guided the widow),

cnv.text: 自我幼年時，孤兒與我一同長大， 以我為父， 從我出母腹以來，我就善待寡婦。

ccb.text: 我自幼就如父亲般抚养孤儿， 我自出母胎就照顾寡妇。
